title: Senior Financial Analyst - Scripbox - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Scripbox - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!
